roles.title: Roles & Permissions
roles.subtitle: Manage admin roles, the permission matrix and administrator bindings
roles.deleteConfirmDesc: Delete role "{name}"? Built-in roles or roles still bound to administrators cannot be deleted.
roles.permissionsHint: Check to grant a permission, uncheck to revoke it
roles.allPermissionsDesc: platform_admin holds every admin permission; the matrix is read-only.
roles.selectRoleHint: Select a role on the left to view its permissions

createDialog.title: Create admin role
createDialog.description: Custom roles can be deleted anytime; built-in roles are seeded by the system
createDialog.codePlaceholder: Lowercase letters, digits and underscores, e.g. ops_admin
createDialog.name: Name
createDialog.descriptionPlaceholder: Optional, describe the purpose of this role

bind.title: Bind administrator
bind.hint: Grant an admin role to a platform user, optionally scoped to an organization or application
bind.required: Select a user and a role
bind.scopeIdRequired: Scope ID is required for non-global scopes
bind.userPickerPlaceholder: Search users by email or name
